calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Abdullah Abdul Hassan Alghazawy was present in pro per on behalf of himself, and as Guardian ad litem for the minors, Ali Abdul Alghazawy and Abdullah Abdul Hassan Alghazawy.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Hameed Thafery Alghazawy.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Ali Hameed Alghazawy and Abdullah Hameed Alghazawy.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
